steps.title: Keep the embedded question declarative
steps.content: The clause after "which link" is embedded inside a statement, so it should use normal subject-verb order: "you should choose." The whole sentence defines click restraint, so it should end with a period.

steps.title: Reject question forms
steps.content:
• Choice A uses inverted question order inside an embedded clause.
  • Choice B has the right word order but wrongly ends the statement with a question mark.
  • Choice C uses both inverted word order and a question mark.
The remaining choice keeps declarative order and final punctuation. The answer is D.
